column2: ถูกเผงเลย (tùuk pěng ləəi)
column3: Spot on!; Exactly!; You hit the nail on the head!   Note:  -ถูกต้อง(เลย) (tùuk dtɔ̂ng; tùuk dtɔ̂ng ləəi)
column4: has a similar meaning but is a bit  less emphatic.

column2: นั่นแหละ (nân-lɛ̀)
column3: Exactly.; That's it/right.; There you are then.; That's... (or  emphasizes preceding part of sentence).

column2: (ก็)นั่นน่ะสิ (nân-nâ-sì; gɔ̂ɔ nân-nâ-sì)
column3: Quite right!; Yes...; Exactly!; That's just it!

column2: จะไปแล้ว (jà bpai lɛ́ɛo)
column3: (I) gotta get going; I'm gonna go now.; I gotta run.

column2: ไปไหน (bpai nǎi)
column3: Where are you going?

column2: พูดเล่น (pûut-lên)
column3: Just joking!; I'm kidding.

column2: อย่าพูดเล่น (yàa pûut-lên)
column3: Don't joke around.

column2: โอ้โฮ (ôo-hǒo)
column3: Wow; Oh!; Gee!; Holy Cow!; Whoa! (shows surprise in a  kind of cute, comical way)

column2: ตายแล้ว (dtaai-lɛ́ɛo)
column3: Goodness!; Shoot!; Shit! Oh my!

column2: ทุกอย่างจะดีขึ้นเอง (túk-yàang jà dii kʉ̂n eeng)
column3: Everything will be okay/  work out.; It will all work out.

column2: อีกแล้วหรือ (ìik lɛ́ɛo rʉ̌ʉ)
column3: Again?!; It happened again?!; You did it again?!

column2: ไม่ใช่ครั้งแรก (mâi-châi kráng-rɛ̂ɛk)
column3: This/That/It's not the first time.

column2: คุณว่าอะไรนะ (kun wâa àrai ná)
column3: What did you say?   Note:

column1: -คุณพูดว่าอะไรนะ (kun pûut wâa àrai ná)
column2: is a bit longer and less casual way to  say this.
ใครว่า... (krai wâa...)
column3: Who says...?; Who said...?

column2: โธ่เอ๋ย/โธ่เอ๊ย (tôo-əə̌i/tôo-əə́i)
column3: Oh man!; Come on man!; Oh dear!; Shit!;  (Oh), damn!, etc.

column2: อะไรก็ได้ (à-rai gɔ̂ɔ dâi)
column3: Anything's fine.; Whatever you want.; whatever;  anything

column2: หุบปาก (hùp-bpàak)
column3: Shut up!; Keep quiet!; Shush!; Zip it!

column2: บอกแล้วไง(...) (bɔ̀ɔk lɛ́ɛo ngai...)
column3: I told you...; I told you so.

column2: อย่ามายุ่ง(กับ...) (yàa maa yûng; yàa maa yûng gàp...)
column3: Don't mess with  (me)!; Leave me alone!; Bug off!; Stay out of it!

column2: พูดง่ายแต่ทำยาก (pûut ngâai dtɛ̀ɛ tam yâak)
column3: Easier said than done!; Easy  to say but difficult to do.
